zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain於大約1345年出生在法國德 艾斯特豪-馬內a奧維利亞時，他的父親Jean Ier de Thil56歲，母親Jeanne de Châteauvillain21歲。他於1365年與Jeanne de Grancey在法國布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1419年在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內豪蒙特a奧維利亞享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain于大约1345年出生在法国德 艾斯特豪-馬內a奧維利亞时，他的父亲Jean Ier de Thil56岁，母亲Jeanne de Châteauvillain21岁。他于1365年与Jeanne de Grancey在法国布格o-達格朗希勒-a奧结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1419年在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內豪蒙特a奧維利亞享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain was born about 1345, in Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, France, his father, Jean Ier de Thil, was 56 and his mother, Jeanne de Châteauvillain, was 21. He married Jeanne de Grancey in 1365, in Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1419, in Châteauvillain, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain est né environ 1345, à Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, France, son père, Jean Ier de Thil, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Châteauvillain, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Grancey en 1365, à Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1419, à Châteauvillain, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain um 1345 in Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean Ier de Thil 56 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Châteauvillain 21. Er hat 1365 in Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich Jeanne de Grancey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1419 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Châteauvillain, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain è nato il circa 1345 nel Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Jean Ier de Thil, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Châteauvillain, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Grancey nel 1365, nel Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1419, nel Châteauvillain, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillainが約1345年にフランスグランド エストハウテ-マルンチaテアウヴィレインで生まれた時，父Jean Ier de Thilは56歳，母Jeanne de Châteauvillainは21歳であった。1365年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルグランセイ-レ-チaテアウでJeanne de Granceyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1419年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンチャウモントチaテアウヴィレインで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain(이)가 대략 1345년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 하테-마니 cha테오비린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean Ier de Thil(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Châteauvillain(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1365년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 그랜스이-레-cha테오에서 Jeanne de Grancey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 차몽 cha테오비린에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain nasceu aproximadamente 1345, em Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Jean Ier de Thil, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Châteauvillain, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Grancey em 1365, em Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1419, em Châteauvillain, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain родился около 1345 г. в местности чaтовиллеин, хауте-марн, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean Ier de Thil было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Châteauvillain, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Grancey в 1365 г. в местности гранси-ле-чaто, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1419 г. в местности чaтовиллеин, чаумонт, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean II de Thil-Châteauvillain nació aproximadamente 1345, en Châteauvillain, Haute-Marne, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Jean Ier de Thil, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Châteauvillain, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Grancey en 1365, en Grancey-le-Château, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1419, en Châteauvillain, Chaumont, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 75 años.
